allBookings.title: All Bookings
allBookings.subtitle: Global monitor. Net prices visible — for internal TravelOTA use only.
allBookings.netPriceDescription: You are viewing the 3 price levels: Net (TravelOTA cost), Agency (agency selling price) and Final sale (client price). This information is confidential.
allBookings.noResultsDescription: Adjust the search filters and try again.
allBookings.initialStateDescription: Use filters to search by locator, guest, destination, agency, seller, status or dates.

supportUsers.title: Support Users
supportUsers.subtitle: Manage TravelOTA internal agents. They have access to net prices and all system bookings.
supportUsers.permissionsDescription: These users see net prices in all their searches. They cannot confirm bookings. They have no access to 'My Bookings' or 'My Agency'.
supportUsers.noResults: No users found with applied filters.

create.title: New Internal User
create.warningDescription: This user will see net prices and have global system visibility. They cannot confirm bookings.

edit.title: Edit User
edit.passwordHint: Leave blank to keep unchanged. Minimum 8 characters if modified.

templates.title: B2B Itinerary Templates
templates.subtitle: Manage base "Promotional Itineraries". These templates will appear on the travel agency platform so they can clone and adjust them for their clients with a single click.

toastMessage.title: Template Loaded
